title: You Are the Exit Liquidity
relevance_summary: Quickie rug pull scams leveraging social media and influencers to trigger panic selling

prevention.rule: Block any tx involving large transfers from known meme tokens during short periods after stealth launches.

monitoring_rules: Monitor for stealth launches and large transfers from meme tokens within short timeframes
summary: Scammers use social media and influencers to create panic selling in meme tokens, exploiting FOMO and tribalism. A guard could prevent losses by blocking large transfers from meme tokens shortly after stealth launches.
